name: enhanced-json-schema-extensions
description: Enhanced JSON Schema uses x-* extensions for MST metadata: x-mst-type (identifier|reference|maybe-reference), x-reference-type (single|array), x-reference-target (model name), x-computed (boolean). DDL must read these extensions to infer PKs, FKs, and skip computed properties.
recommendation: DDL generator should use the EnhancedJsonSchema type as input schema format. Import from schematic/types.ts.
